profile.name: Muhammad Husnain ul Haq Malik
profile.subtitle: Pakistan Soft Tennis & Cricket Athlete
profile.bio_summary: Representing Pakistan in Soft Tennis internationally, playing competitive cricket in regional leagues, and pursuing Computer Science.
profile.bio_details: I am Muhammad Husnain ul Haq Malik, a passionate Soft Tennis player, Regional Cricketer, and Computer Science student. I have been playing Soft Tennis for the past two years and recently had the honor of representing Pakistan in an international tournament in South Korea.
profile.vision: To win international medals for Pakistan in Soft Tennis and play cricket at the highest domestic and international levels while leveraging tech to build the future.

achievements.title: Pakistan National Colors
achievements.description: The honour of wearing Pakistan’s color the privilege of competing internationally.Representing Pakistan on the international stage is more than a privilege.it’s the greatest honor of my sporting journey.”

achievements.title: Cricket Career Highlights
achievements.description:
Part of the Lahore Qalandars Player Development Program (PDP), one of Pakistan’s leading high-performance cricket talent development initiatives.

* Representing multinational cricket teams while consistently contributing match-winning performances in highly competitive local and multinational tournaments.

* Currently training and competing with Future Star Cricket Academy, continuously developing technical skills, match awareness, and overall performance.

achievements.title: Club Cricket
achievements.description: Led New Sangam Cricket Club to tournament finals with key performances with bat and field strategy. * Representing New Sangam Cricket Club in Pakistan Cricket Board (PCB) Inter-Club Tournaments.

achievements.title: Korea Cup 2026
achievements.description: Represented Pakistan in prestigious international Soft Tennis tournament (KOREA CUP 2026) highlighted by securing a 3rd position in a mix team event at the Korea Cup 2026. Consistently competing at the highest level, I have demonstrated resilience, discipline, and a commitment to excellence while proudly representing my country on the international stage.

timeline.title: Began Soft Tennis Career
timeline.description: Embarked on court training under senior coaches, mastering spin dynamics and high-end agility mechanics.

timeline.title: Professional Cricket Debut
timeline.description: Inducted into Regional Cricket Zone II and New Sangam Cricket Club after outstanding performance in trial games.

timeline.title: Pakistan Representation
timeline.description: Selected to represent Pakistan in an international Soft Tennis Championship, facing global opponents with pride.

timeline.title: Tech-Athlete Fusion
timeline.description: Developing digital sports analytics systems while pushing limits on the field and completing computer science studies.
